def positive_list_comprehension_only_for_length():
    rule_id = "list_comprehension_only_for_length"
    family = "hot_path"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "A list comprehension is built only so len(...) can be called on it."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
